data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC suggests CWAN, FFWM, CFLT shareholders reach out to discuss rights due to possible violations.
data.description: Investors are advised to reach out to the company promptly as time may be restricted for asserting their rights. As of January 13, 2026 in New York, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm focusing on investor rights, is looking into various companies for potential breaches of federal securities laws and/or violations.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC urges VTYX, SNCY, EKSO shareholders to discuss rights; investigating potential violations. Act now. Jan. 13, 2026. 118 characters.
data.description: Investors are urged to reach out to the company promptly due to a potential time constraint to protect their rights. A renowned law firm, Halper Sadeh LLC based in New York, as of January 13, 2026, is currently looking into multiple companies for suspected infringements of federal securities laws and/or breaches.

data.title: Investor rights firm urges RYN, BHF, MOFG, FMNB shareholders to discuss rights. Contact ASAP. Investigating securities laws violations. JAN. 13, 2026.
data.description: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC is currently investigating several companies for potential violations of federal securities laws and breaches. Shareholders are advised to reach out to the firm promptly as there may be a limited window to enforce their rights. The investigation, announced on January 13, 2026, pertains to undisclosed numbers of companies. Shareholders with concerns about their rights in relation to these companies should act swiftly to protect their interests.

data.title: TomTom launches Area Analytics for precise traffic insights; tool lets users define and analyze traffic with hourly data.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, in Amsterdam, TomTom (TOM2), a leading mapping and location technology company, introduced Area Analytics. This new traffic analytics tool allows cities, governments, and organizations to analyze traffic within custom-defined areas over various periods. The tool provides detailed hourly data that can be examined for days, months, or years, offering a comprehensive understanding of mobility trends.

data.title: TomTom and Miovision join forces to enhance traffic optimization worldwide, leveraging analytics for better road networks.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, TomTom (TOM2) and Miovision unveiled a strategic partnership aimed at enhancing traffic management and infrastructure investments on a global scale. This collaboration integrates TomTom's Traffic Analytics suite with Miovision's innovative traffic software and hardware solutions. By merging their expertise, the two companies seek to enhance the safety and efficiency of road networks worldwide.
